utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: That is the day you are gonna die ? See ... darnit , I have got shuffleboard that day .

emotion_cause.span: 1_That is the day you are gonna die ?

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: Well , I mean what about friends of your grandmother ? Would not they have the recipe ?

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: Well , you know I may have relatives in France who would know . My grandmother said she got the recipe from her grandmother , Nesele Tolouse .

emotion_cause.span: 4_My grandmother said she got the recipe from her grandmother , Nesele Tolouse .

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: Oh , you Americans always butcher the French language .

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: I cannot believe that I just spent the last two days trying to figure out the recipe and it was in my cupboard the whole time !

emotion_cause.span: 10_I just spent the last two days trying to figure out the recipe and it was in my cupboard the whole time !

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: I know ! You see it is stuff like this which is why you are burning in hell ! !

emotion_cause.span: 10_I just spent the last two days trying to figure out the recipe and it was in my cupboard the whole time !
